scripts.build: bun run --filter '@elorm/schema' build && bun run --filter '@elorm/themes' build && bun run --filter 'elorm' build && bun run registry:build && bun run docs:generate && bun run --filter 'www' build
scripts.registry:build: bun run --filter '@elorm/schema' build && bun run --filter '@elorm/themes' build && bun run --filter 'elorm' build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js build --output apps/www/public/r --registry registry.json
scripts.publish:cli: bun run --filter '@elorm/schema' build && bun run --filter '@elorm/themes' build && bun run --filter 'elorm' build && cd packages/cli && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:cli:dry-run: bun run --filter '@elorm/schema' build && bun run --filter '@elorm/themes' build && bun run --filter 'elorm' build && cd packages/cli && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.www:sync: cp packages/registry/lib/ui-styles.ts apps/www/lib/ui-styles.ts && cp packages/registry/ui/*.tsx apps/www/components/ui/ && cp packages/registry/blocks/*.tsx apps/www/components/blocks/ && cp packages/registry-radix/ui/*.tsx apps/www/components/ui-radix/
